description: Model routing configuration for research agents. Routes tasks to optimal models based on complexity and cost.

claim-extractor.reason: Pattern matching against known claim indicators. No judgment needed.

claim-classifier.reason: Categorization from fixed taxonomy (empirical, theoretical, etc.).

evidence-locator.reason: Reference resolution and cross-referencing. Mechanical lookup.

evidence-grader.reason: Quality judgment required. Must assess sufficiency of evidence.

novelty-checker.reason: Semantic comparison with literature. Requires nuanced understanding.

assumption-surfacer.reason: Implicit reasoning required. Must identify unstated premises.

cross-referencer.reason: Holistic consistency check across entire paper. Highest stakes.

proof-step-extractor.reason: Structured decomposition of proofs into steps. Balanced capability/cost.

proof-step-verifier.reason: Mathematical verification requires deepest reasoning. Highest stakes per step.

assumption-analyzer.reason: Requires broad knowledge of standard assumptions. Balanced capability/cost.

derivation-checker.reason: Algebraic verification requires careful step-by-step checking. High stakes.

parallel-audit.reason: Complex coordination of many subagents. Must plan optimally.

parallel-review.reason: Full paper review coordination. High complexity.

parallel-theory-audit.reason: Complex coordination of theory verification subagents. Must plan optimally.

proof-auditor.reason: Deep mathematical reasoning for proof verification. Highest capability needed.

bounds-analyst.reason: Comparing bounds to known optima requires broad theoretical knowledge.

notation-consistency-checker.reason: Hybrid script+LLM. Script handles extraction, LLM handles semantics.

theorem-dependency-mapper.reason: Hybrid script+LLM. Structured graph construction with semantic analysis.

proof-strategy-advisor.reason: Creative technique suggestion requires broad knowledge. Higher temp for diversity.

counterexample-searcher.reason: Constructing counterexamples requires creative mathematical reasoning.

intuition-formalizer.reason: Formalizing vague intuitions requires deep mathematical understanding.

theory-connector.reason: Cross-domain pattern matching requires broadest knowledge base.

batch-arxiv.reason: Query construction and result parsing. Mechanical.

parallel.description: Maximum parallelization for speed. Use for large papers with many claims.

pipeline.description: Sequential stages with data passing. Use for thorough, methodical analysis.

eco.description: Budget-friendly execution. Downgrades models where possible.

thorough.description: Maximum quality. Upgrades models and adds extra verification.
